title: Systems Design & Development

prerequisites.text: Minimum 45% final mark for [INF2007 or INF2008 or CSC2001 or equivalent] and INF2009 and [INF1003 or CSC1016 or equivalent].

outline: This course provides in-depth knowledge of the systems development process with particular emphasis on the design and implementation stages of the life cycle. There is a strong practical component where students use object-oriented tools to design and construct a working system, building on the skills acquired in INF2009F Systems Analysis.
lecture_times: Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday, 4th period. Thursday: Weekly workshop sessions 3rd–4th periods OR 4th–5th periods. Friday: Practical workshops 5th–7th periods.
dp_requirements: Submit 80% of workshops and quizzes. Year-mark of 45%. Submitted all project work.
assessment: Coursework 60%; exam 40%. Sub-minimum of 45% for the final exam.
